method_summary: They define traits as directions in text embedding space, train a linear model on labeled skill diffs, and score skill edits by projecting embedding diffs onto trait vectors.
key_innovation: Trait evaluation framework using embedding space directions and linear models for measuring agent behavioral changes
datasets_used: 68 labeled skill diff pairs for the trait of propensity to seek sensitive data
best_result: 91.2% sign classification accuracy on 68 labeled skill diff pairs
title: Tracking the Behavioral Trajectories of Adapting Agents
